case_title: JAMES MACDONALD VS. ANGELINA MICHELLE ALOGANN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2408 TARAVAL ST. S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, ORIGINAL LEASE CANCELLED.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, JAMES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF JAMES MACDONALD RE: LOST ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, JAMES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, JAMES SERVED OCT-12-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $1,160.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ALOGANN, ANGELINA MICHELLE
